query: DynamoDB query flexibility and analytics support for real-time workloads
answer: DynamoDB supports flexible querying and real-time analytics through features like DynamoDB Streams and integration with AWS services for advanced analytics. It enables high-performance, scalable applications with automatic replication and fault tolerance. Real-time analytics can be achieved using external tools like Singlestore.

results.title: Amazon DynamoDB - Learn High Performance & Developer Efficiency with AWS NoSQL
results.snippet: AWS DynamoDB, also known as Amazon DynamoDB, is a fully managed DynamoDB NoSQL database that delivers lightning-fast performance, seamless scalability, and serverless reliability for modern cloud applications. With automatic data replication, fault tolerance, and multi-region, multi-active durability, DynamoDB provides built-in security, in-memory caching, and effortless management powering modern, internet-scale applications without the need for servers or manual infrastructure handling. This section explains how tables, keys, indexes, and capacity modes enable high performance and flexibility in AWS DynamoDB. Amazon DynamoDB delivers high performance, security, and scalability making it a powerful, fully managed NoSQL database for modern cloud applications. With DynamoDB Global Tables, data is automatically replicated across multiple AWS Regions, enabling multi-active writes, global availability, and disaster recovery. Amazon DynamoDB fuels high-performance applications across industries—from real-time gaming to global retail—delivering seamless scalability, lightning-fast performance, and reliability for modern digital businesses. Amazon DynamoDB, part of the AWS ecosystem, empowers teams to build high-performance, scalable NoSQL applications while optimizing data design, performance, and reliability for business-critical workloads on Amazon Web Services (AWS).
